title: Tide Pooling
summary: Flip rocks on a pixel beach and meet Pacific Northwest tide pool critters.
intro: Tide pooling is one of my favorite things to do on the coast. Tap the rocks and driftwood logs on the beach below to see what's hiding underneath, and learn a real fact about each creature. Try to find them all.

inaturalist.heading: My tide pooling observations
inaturalist.blurb: Real critters I've logged on iNaturalist out on the rocks. Tap any photo to open the full observation.
